seo_description: Zero-dependency, self-contained Linux server monitoring. Single binary, real-time dashboard, built-in storage engine. Just deploy and go.
hero_sub: Zero dependencies. No external databases. Single binary. Just deploy and go.
feature_zero_desc: No databases, no agents, no runtime. Upload one binary to your server and start monitoring in seconds.
feature_dash_desc: WebSocket-powered live charts with Chart.js, SVG gauges, interactive zoom, focus mode, and light/dark themes.
feature_storage_desc: Tiered ring-buffer engine with predictable disk usage. 1s, 1m, and 5m resolution tiers — no cleanup needed.
feature_privacy_desc: Works on closed networks. No calls to external services. No cloud APIs. No tracking.
feature_open_desc: Kula is free to use and open source. Licensed under AGPLv3. Check the code and contribute on GitHub.
feature_linux_desc: Reads directly from /proc and /sys every second. Supports amd64, arm64, and riscv64 architectures.
metric_cpu_details: Total usage (user, system, iowait, irq, softirq, steal) + core count
metric_memory_details: Total, free, available, used, buffers, cached, shmem
metric_network_details: Per-interface throughput (Mbps), packets/s, errors, drops; TCP stats; socket counts
metric_disks_details: Per-device I/O (read/write bytes/s, IOPS); filesystem usage
metric_system_details: Uptime, entropy, clock sync, hostname, logged-in user count
metric_self_details: Kula's own CPU%, RSS memory, open file descriptors
footer_copy: Licensed under AGPLv3 · Linux® is the registered trademark of Linus Torvalds
